ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Continued To Mar-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for Linda Hackett.

Ms. Callejo requested a continuance through the end of the year stating that the only Beneficiary turns eighteen on December 20th and that they are trying to figure out how to transfer the assets and not distribute them to the guardianship. Ms. Callejo also stated that this is an asset from a Trust, that there are two lots in Texas, that the assessed value is $35,000.00 and that they are trying to figure out how to transfer them to the Minor. In addition, Ms. Callejo stated that she has spoken with Ms. Alavi, that Ms. Alavi is happy to discuss the accounting/bank statements with the Minor, and spoke of the possibility of signing of a waiver. The Court informed Counsel that she needs to file an ex parte petition to increase bond. Status on filing of said petition is set for October 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is continued to March 5, 2018 (deadline for filing petition) at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Ms. Callejo is unable to meet the deadline, she is to notify the Court on January 8, 2018 and file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Continued To Apr-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: G. Franchesca Callejo for petitioner Linda Hackett.

Ms. Callejo stated that the petitioner was very close to being ready to file the petition, and that the petitioner also needed to file a tax return because of the sale of a property. She stated that she should be able to have the petitin on file, and requested a continuance until after April 15. The matter was continued to April 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Callejo responded that she would have a petition for closing or to approve status of administration on file before that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
